content_summary: This file defines an enumeration for the available FingerprintJS versions, along with extensions to provide the latest version and utility functions for working with arrays of versions.
fingerprint_contribution: This file contributes to the final device fingerprint by defining the available versions of the fingerprinting algorithm and providing a way to determine the latest version. This is crucial in ensuring that the most up-to-date and accurate fingerprinting techniques are used, which ultimately affects the final device fingerprint.
